hero.title: Between class chat, fake news & AI
hero.lead: The learning app for digital media literacy in everyday life
hero.leadEmphasis: Every day, children encounter new situations online: peer pressure, fake news, trends, privacy issues, or cyberbullying.
hero.leadEmphasis2: Amy Surfwing helps them understand this world better and protect themselves.
hero.bannerAlt: Insight into the story world of Amy Surfwing
hero.parentHintLink: Find out more & set up the app →
hero.introHint: No sign-up needed – just get started.

about.whatBody1: The new chat series for kids in an interactive story world.
about.whatBody2: The learning app for media literacy, where kids think through digital situations.

principles.1: ⏱️ 5 minutes instead of endless screen time
principles.5: 🔒 A safe space instead of a social network

welcome.title:
Welcome to
Amy Surfwing!
welcome.lead: Discover the secrets of Yasmin, Carlos & Co. With Amy Surfwing you master challenges. The online adventures are waiting for you.

info.title: Here's how it works
info.amicExplain: 💬 An Amic is a short chat chapter — ⏱️ 5 min, 5× a week
info.feature0body: Fake news, AI, cyberbullying — what Yasmin & Co. experience also happens in real life.
info.feature1body: You have access to the class chat! Read along as Yasmin & Co. experience real situations — and answer questions that make you think.
info.feature2body: After each Amic, extras unlock: Yasmin's secret diary, the class newspaper, and Carlos's lexicon.

avatar.title: Choose your avatar
avatar.hint: You can change it any time in your profile.

ready.title: Ready!
ready.lead: Your first Amic is waiting. See what's happening in class.
ready.remindersLabel: Remind me when a new Amic is waiting

entries.title: Where would you like to begin?
entries.body: You can explore Amy Surfwing from different perspectives.

0.title: What children learn here
